description: A user has forgotten their Windows password and is locked out of their computer.

nodes.task_description: Verify the user's identity over the phone using pre-defined security questions.

expected_outcome.value: The technician successfully authenticates the user.

nodes.task_description: Use the Active Directory management tool to reset the user's password.

expected_outcome.value: The user's password is reset in Active Directory.

nodes.task_description: Provide the temporary password to the user and instruct them to change it upon their first login.

expected_outcome.value: The user is able to log in and reset their password.
